'''nafodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zedakah|zedakah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zedakah|zedakah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nafodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næfedheth|næfedheth]] || [[word:næfedhej|næfedhej]] || [[word:næfedhesh|næfedhesh]] || [[word:næfedhe|næfedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nafofodhoth|nafofodhoth]] || [[word:nafofodhoj|nafofodhoj]] || [[word:nafofodhosh|nafofodhosh]] || [[word:nafofodho|nafofodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nafodhoth|nafodhoth]] || [[word:nafodhoj|nafodhoj]] || [[word:nafodhosh|nafodhosh]] || [[word:nafodho|nafodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nafofdhoth|nafofdhoth]] || [[word:nafofdhoj|nafofdhoj]] || [[word:nafofdhosh|nafofdhosh]] || [[word:nafofdhof|nafofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nafodhotho|nafodhotho]] || [[word:nafodhojo|nafodhojo]] || [[word:nafodhosho|nafodhosho]] || [[word:nafodhoko|nafodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nafodhoth|nafodhoth]] || [[word:nafodhoj|nafodhoj]] || [[word:nafodhosh|nafodhosh]] || [[word:nafodho|nafodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nafodhothol|nafodhothol]] || [[word:nafodhojol|nafodhojol]] || [[word:nafodhoshol|nafodhoshol]] || [[word:nafodhokol|nafodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nafodhothotho|nafodhothotho]] || [[word:nafodhojojo|nafodhojojo]] || [[word:nafodhoshosho|nafodhoshosho]] || [[word:nafodhoko|nafodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nafodhothon|nafodhothon]] || [[word:nafodhojon|nafodhojon]] || [[word:nafodhoshon|nafodhoshon]] || [[word:nafodhokon|nafodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nafodhothoro|nafodhothoro]] || [[word:nafodhojoro|nafodhojoro]] || [[word:nafodhoshoro|nafodhoshoro]] || [[word:nafodhokoro|nafodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
